title: Integrate the committee-driven loop model across config, scripts, templates, and references
acceptance: The loop config defines research and committee requirements
The default committee defines product-manager, technical-architect, and user roles with 3 to 5 members each
The kit includes reference, script, and template support for the committee-driven loop model
notes: This establishes the first end-to-end committee-driven version before later iterations deepen durability and installer support.

title: Persist research and committee review conclusions into loop state
acceptance: The state model can store research findings, committee notes, and review decisions for the active iteration
The repo includes a script that records review findings into durable state
The stored review data remains concise and machine-readable
notes: Committee review should survive context loss instead of living only in reports or chat.

title: Read committee review state back into project data and reports
acceptance: Collected project data includes the latest recorded review state
Reports can render research findings and committee decisions from durable state with minimal manual flags
The data model stays consistent across state, project data, and report generation
notes: The loop should not require manual copy-paste of committee conclusions.

title: Add a project installation script for the committee-driven kit
acceptance: The repo contains a script that installs the loop kit into a target project root
The installer copies committee-driven references and scripts without requiring manual file-by-file copying
The installer avoids overwriting target-project-specific validation config unless explicitly requested
notes: This makes the upgraded committee loop easier to adopt in real projects.

title: Require recorded review state before reporting and publication
acceptance: The loop refuses to report or publish when required review-state artifacts are missing
Validation can detect missing durable review-state support
Protocol and README explain the new gate clearly
notes: This closes the gap between committee guidance and enforceable release gates.
